a:r.a:t: Manager and Director positions are generally more competitive than market for total cash compensation,
frontline telemarketing roles are aligned with market pay mixes
, with a slightly base-heavy pay mix compared to market.
Manager and Director pay mixes are more variable-heavy at HGV compared to market
, which may drive an overemphasis on short-term sales outcomes at the expense of coaching, development, and sustainable team performance.

A 10% premium has been applied to the survey Telemarketing Manager Outbound, Telemarketing Manager Inbound and Telemarketing Director roles to reflect a blend of Manager/Senior Manager and Director/Senior Director levels.
